justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified 'this week, latest Friday' and 'around 10 AM' and accurately reflected these preferences in its responses.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent offered the only available slot and then confirmed no other options were available within the user's preferred timeframe, offering to check next week.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment without any unnecessary turns or redundant queries.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent clearly communicating availability and confirming the booking.
